note: Statistically-grounded founder personas. Superset of reference_class.json: same `features`+`members` shape so sourcing/reference_class.py:match() still runs unchanged. Each member carries extra fields (thesis, stat, benchmark, lifts, sourcing, caveat) a richer matcher can read. NEW feature keys need one clause each in reference_class.py:extract_features to become detectable — marked `detectable:false` until then. Similarity is a SOFT PRIOR, never a gate. See vc_brain_founder_personas.md for the evidence table + citations.

features.label: Ex founder-factory employer
features.stat: E7; E9: elite employer only 34% -> weak signal

features.label: Departed, no new role (stealth)
features.stat: cold-start edge: intent before the title

features.label: Employee #1-50 at a co that scaled
Citable research output
features.stat: E7: DeepMind/OpenAI are #1-2 factories; E16 STEM 49-70%

features.label: High capability, under-networked
features.stat: E13: only 21% of underdog founders raised top-10 VC -> mispriced

features.label: Outside a startup hub
features.stat: E11: 70% of unicorns have underdog founders

personas.thesis: 8-14 yrs deep in one domain, now leaving to build in it (founder-market fit).
personas.benchmark: >=3 yrs (sweet spot 8-14) in TARGET sector; last employer in founder-factory list = bonus
personas.failure_mode: domain expert != builder; require a capability co-signal

personas.thesis: Founded before (exit OR failure) and is starting again.
personas.benchmark: >=1 prior founding; prior exit=strong; prior FAILURE = positive, never penalized
personas.failure_mode: persistence is partly market-timing luck (Gompers); don't over-credit one prior win

personas.thesis: Employee #1-50 at a company that worked; departing with no new role.
personas.stat: E7, E9 (elite employer only 34% -> signal not gate)
personas.benchmark: joined at headcount <50 / pre-Series-B, company later scaled
personas.failure_mode: MOST network-gated persona -> cap weight; never let it out-vote capability

personas.thesis: Ships constantly, earns organic attention, no pedigree required. (Live today.)
personas.benchmark: >=8 repos, >=20 pushes/90d, >=100 organic stars, >=4 langs (live in extract_features)
personas.failure_mode: GitHub-only view misses non-code builders; absence = unknown, not zero

personas.thesis: Researcher/PhD with citable output, now commercializing it.
personas.benchmark: >=1 substantive publication OR released model w/ organic uptake
personas.failure_mode: citations != shipping; weight down with zero product motion

personas.thesis: High demonstrated capability, low network coverage, outside the hubs. THE ALPHA.
personas.stat: E10 (classic archetype 11%), E11 (70% underdog), E12 (62% immigrant), E13 (21% raised top-10 VC -> mispriced)
personas.benchmark: Capability >= P4 thresholds AND provenance coverage < 0.2 -> flag high-cap/under-networked (POSITIVE)
personas.failure_mode: TRAP: must fire ON capability, never demographics alone, or it is proxy-discrimination

caveat: Winners-only + illustrative. Similarity is a SOFT PRIOR, never a filter. A real base rate needs the denominator (who had these features and did NOT succeed). Trigger modifier 'Catalyst' (layoff/Open-to-Work) amplifies P1/P3/P6 when paired with building activity; it is a state, not a persona.
